title: Powers of products & quotients (structured practice)
description: Rewrite expressions that involve powers of products and quotients. Expressions are in ascending difficulty.
topic_path: Module 1: Integer exponents and scientific notation
Topic A: Exponential notation and properties of integer exponents

assessment_items.question_content:
**Simplify.**  
*Rewrite the expression in the form $k\cdot x^n$.*

$(4x)^2=$ [[☃ expression 1]]

**Simplify.**  
*Rewrite the expression in the form $\dfrac{z^n}{k}$.*

$\left(\dfrac{z}{5}\right)^2=$ [[☃ expression 1]]

**Simplify.**  
*Rewrite the expression in the form $k\cdot y^n$.*

$\left(2y^4\right)^3=$ [[☃ expression 1]]
